text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. It involves teaching machines to grasp the meaning behind words in a text, not just their literal definitions. For example, NLP powers translation tools that convert sentences between languages while preserving their original sense. It also performs sentiment analysis, which detects emotions like happiness or anger in written content. Chatbots are another common application; they use NLP to interpret questions and provide helpful responses in real time. From voice assistants to email filters, NLP makes our interactions with technology more natural and efficient.
